title: kerstingiella uniflora
intro: Kerstingiella uniflora, also known as the Single-flowered Kerstingia, is a flowering plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Kerstingiella uniflora include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
